mainEntity.name: What if employer fires me after forklift injury report in South Salt Lake UT?
mainEntity.text: What if employer fires me after forklift injury report in South Salt Lake UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation under Utah law—file wrongful discharge claim plus comp. Reinstatement or front/back pay possible; whistleblower protections apply to safety reports.

suggestedAnswer.text: South Salt Lake warehouses pressure injured forklift ops to quit. Document termination timing, emails; Labor Commission investigates. Secure comp first, then sue for discrimination—recover lost wages beyond comp caps. Common after OSHA-citable violations.

name: Fired After Reporting Forklift Accident in South Salt Lake
description: Illegal retaliation under Utah law—file wrongful discharge claim plus comp. Reinstatement or front/back pay possible; whistleblower protections apply to safety
